name: Like Like Drive Inn
tagline: A 24-hour diner serving old-school Hawaiian comfort food since 1953 — oxtail soup, pancakes, and loco moco at 3am.
talkStory: Pronounced 'lee-keh lee-keh' (named after the Likelike Highway nearby), this 24-hour diner has been feeding Honolulu's late-night crowd since 1953. The oxtail soup, pancake stack, and loco moco are comfort food classics done right. After-bar crowds, night-shift workers, and early-morning fishermen all converge here. The vinyl booths and Formica tables haven't changed in decades, and that's exactly the point.
